extraction.one_line_summary: LEÓN SÁNCHEZ attacked with 12km remaining to win solo, while ZAKARIN Ilnur took overall lead by narrowest margins via time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: Astana paced aggressively through final 35km climbs to set up late attacks rather than defending.
Time bonuses at intermediate sprint actively contested by GC riders when gaps under one second overall.

rider_signals.LEÓN SÁNCHEZ Luis: positive: veteran showed ability to capitalize on aggressive pace-making with solo 12km attack
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: took GC lead via time bonuses rather than pure climbing, suggesting tactical awareness
rider_signals.IMHOFF Claudio: neutral: mechanical at 35km to go ended KOM jersey effort after 100km+ solo break
